name: Change Management Compliance
description: Verifies that all system changes follow the organization's change management policy. Collects recent change records, cross-references with approval workflows, and uses Riggs AI to identify unauthorized or improperly documented changes. Unauthorized changes trigger an investigation ticket and manager notification; properly documented changes are logged for audit evidence.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: ServiceNow
required_integrations.reason: Retrieve change request records and approval status from ITSM system

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create investigation tickets for unauthorized changes

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify change management board and security of unauthorized changes

config.description: Triggers daily audit of system changes against change management policy

config.query: SELECT change_id, system_name, change_type, changed_by, change_timestamp, change_description, configuration_diff FROM detected_changes WHERE change_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' ORDER BY change_timestamp DESC
config.description: Query configuration management database for all changes detected in the past 24 hours
Retrieve approved and implemented change requests from ServiceNow for the same period

config.additional_instructions: Cross-reference detected system changes against approved change requests. Identify: unauthorized changes (no matching CR), changes implemented outside the approved window, changes without proper rollback documentation, and emergency changes lacking retroactive approval. Flag each unauthorized change with its risk impact.
config.description: AI-powered analysis comparing detected changes against approved change management records
Routes based on whether unauthorized changes were detected without matching approval

parameters.summary: Unauthorized Changes Detected: {{analyze_1.unauthorized_count}} changes without approval

config.description: Create an investigation ticket for unauthorized system changes
Notify the Change Advisory Board of unauthorized changes requiring investigation

parameters.note: Daily change management audit complete. All {{detected_changes.length}} detected changes match approved change requests. Full compliance with change management policy.

config.description: Document that all changes are properly authorized and documented
Change management compliance audit complete -- unauthorized changes flagged or clean audit confirmed
